title: CIP-309 Merkle list commitment
description: A single Merkle list-commitment entry: a CLOSED CBOR map `{alg, root, leaf_count, ? uris}` committing to a list of leaves whose count exceeds what inline `items[]` would carry economically. `root` is the 32-byte commitment root (hex string). `leaf_count` is a CBOR unsigned integer >= 1. `uris` (optional) is a non-empty array of chunked URI arrays locating the leaf manifest. STRUCTURAL only: `alg` registry membership (UNSUPPORTED_MERKLE_COMMIT_ALG), per-algorithm root length, and inclusion-proof correctness are domain-pass / recipient-verifier checks. The map is closed: unknown keys are rejected.
